title: CASE MANAGEMENT AND RESOURCE DISPATCHING - 211info
text: MID-WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SUPPORT NETWORK CASE MANAGEMENT AND RESOURCE DISPATCHING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy and resource navigation including finding gender-affirming healthcare providers, food, housing, medical supplies and obtaining identification documents. 260 SW Madison Avenue Suite 110 Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Individuals who are queer, transgender, non-binary, intersex, gender non-conforming, or intersex and their parents/guardians or close relatives or kinship Hours: Sunday-Friday noon-5pm or by appointment Email (541) 264-1973 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 264-1973 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties, and Grand Ronde and Silletz Tribal Communities SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday noon-5pm. By appointment only for any other days. Services: Case/Care Management * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Identification Cards * LGBTQ2+ Issues LGBTQ2+ Advocacy Groups Specialized Information and Referral * LGBTQ2+ Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DRUG RELATED HARM REDUCTION PROGRAMS - HARM REDUCTION/INJECTION SUPPLY PROGRAM FOOD - FOOD PANTRY MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SUPPORT NETWORK
